risk_title: Political instability affecting technical resource person hiring
risk_summary: Hiring of Technical Resource Persons (TRPs) has been suspended and will only resume after elections, indicating political instability is directly constraining project implementation activities.
evidence_quote: Hiring of TRPs is currently on hold and will be resumed after elections as per need.

risk_title: High political and governance risk rating sustained throughout implementation
risk_summary: The project maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance risk from approval through the current reporting period, indicating persistent governance fragility in Balochistan affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High
